name: Leviathan, Abyssal World-Serpent
flavorText: The abyss is only the shadow cast by its coils.

imagePrompt.subject: An ancient world-serpent with a crowned head, abyssal spines, halo-like fins, and multiple faint celestial eyes that feel uncanny and unnatural rather than conventional monster eyes.
imagePrompt.scene: A lightless abyssal ocean trench with silver bioluminescence deep below, black water above, impossible depth, and submerged darkness swallowing the horizon.
imagePrompt.composition: Dramatic three-quarter view of the head and upper coils emerging from abyssal darkness, with the trench so vast that the serpent's body disappears into it, strong focal silhouette, and readable card-art framing.
imagePrompt.lighting: Sacred dread, deep-time terror, dim silver bioluminescent underlight, cold rim light from abyssal glow, oppressive darkness.
imagePrompt.palette: Black, indigo, bruised violet, silver bioluminescence.
imagePrompt.mood: Biblical-apocalyptic, sacred and terrifying, solemn mythic dread.
imagePrompt.medium: Highly polished digital painting for premium trading card art.
imagePrompt.styleProfile: Cosmic eldritch sea-serpent in a biblical-apocalyptic fantasy illustration style.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: cartoon, anime, low detail, generic dragon, humanoid body, bright daylight, oversaturated colors, heroic pose, cluttered foreground, steampunk
imagePrompt.notes: Generated via CLI fallback image workflow as a Leviathan concept pass; final selected variant was image_3.

notes: Initial demonic figure record for the Angels and Demons set.
